source.title: Jenny Wen
source.summary: It's not just designers who are feeling like, "Oh yeah, we have to keep up with engineers." I think even engineers are like, "How do we keep up with ourselves?", covering product design, AI product work, and engineering tradeoffs.

translated.title: Jenny Wen：设计与工程如何在 AI 时代共同进化
translated.summary: 不只是设计师在想“我们得跟上工程师”，连工程师也在想“我们该如何跟上自己”。本期围绕产品设计、AI 产品实践与工程权衡展开。

source.title: Jeetu Patel
source.summary: And the reason we pulled this thing together, the goal was, what is happening in the industry and how can we help customers make sure that they can make the most of it, covering AI product work, team leadership, and product design.

translated.title: Jeetu Patel：如何看懂产业变化，并帮客户真正用好 AI
translated.summary: 我们推动这件事的核心目标，是看清行业正在发生什么，并帮助客户把新变化转化为真实价值。内容涵盖 AI 产品实践、团队领导与产品设计。

source.title: Boris Cherny
source.summary: This is the world now." What's the next big shift to how software is written that either your team is already operating in or you think will head towards, covering engineering tradeoffs, product design, and AI product work.

translated.title: Boris Cherny：软件开发的下一次范式转移
translated.summary: “这就是现在的世界。”本期探讨软件开发的下一次重大转向：你的团队已经在其中，还是即将进入？重点覆盖工程权衡、产品设计与 AI 产品开发。

source.title: Sequoia CEO coach: Why it’s never been easier to start a company, and never been harder to scale one | Brian Halligan (co-founder, HubSpot)
source.summary: Brian Halligan co-founded HubSpot, ran it as CEO for about 15 years, and now coaches Sequoia’s fastest-growing founders as their in-house CEO coach.

translated.title: 红杉 CEO 教练：创业从未如此容易，规模化却从未如此困难 | Brian Halligan（HubSpot 联合创始人）
translated.summary: Brian Halligan 是 HubSpot 联合创始人，曾担任约 15 年 CEO。如今他作为红杉内部 CEO 教练，辅导其增长最快的一批创始人。

source.title: Sherwin Wu V2
source.summary: If you talk to a lot of engineers, the thing that annoys them the most is after you've written your beautiful code, how do you get it into production, covering engineering tradeoffs, AI product work, and team leadership.

translated.title: Sherwin Wu V2：写出优雅代码之后，真正难的是上线
translated.summary: 很多工程师最头疼的，不是写代码，而是把写好的代码稳定地推入生产环境。本期讨论工程权衡、AI 产品实践与团队领导。

source.title: The rise of the professional vibe coder (a new AI-era job) | Lazar Jovanovic (Professional Vibe Coder)
source.summary: Lazar Jovanovic is a full-time professional vibe coder at Lovable. His job is to build both internal tools and customer-facing products purely using AI, while not having a coding background.

translated.title: 职业 Vibe Coder 的崛起（AI 时代的新职业）| Lazar Jovanovic（职业 Vibe Coder）
translated.summary: Lazar Jovanovic 在 Lovable 全职担任职业 Vibe Coder。他没有传统编程背景，却用 AI 同时构建内部工具和面向客户的产品。

source.title: A child psychologist’s guide to working with difficult adults | Dr. Becky Kennedy
source.summary: Working with difficult adults, covering product design, team leadership, and practical product lessons.

translated.title: 儿童心理学家教你如何与难相处的成年人共事 | Becky Kennedy 博士
translated.summary: 如何与“难相处”的成年人高效合作。内容聚焦产品设计、团队领导，以及可直接落地的实践经验。

source.title: Marc Andreessen: The real AI boom hasn’t even started yet
source.summary: Marc Andreessen is a founder, investor, and co-founder of Netscape, as well as co-founder of the venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz (a16z). In this conversation, we dig into why we’re living through a unique and one of the most incredible times in history, and what comes next.

translated.title: Marc Andreessen：真正的 AI 繁荣才刚刚开始
translated.summary: Marc Andreessen 是创业者与投资人，也是 Netscape 联合创始人及 a16z 联合创始人。本期讨论为何我们正处在历史上极其独特的阶段，以及接下来会发生什么。

source.title: 5 questions to ask when your product stops growing | Jason Cohen (2x unicorn founder)
source.summary: Jason’s five-step framework: logo retention, pricing, NRR, marketing channels, target market.

translated.title: 当产品停止增长时，先问这 5 个问题 | Jason Cohen（两家独角兽创始人）
translated.summary: Jason 提出五步诊断框架：Logo 留存、定价、NRR、营销渠道、目标市场，帮助团队快速定位增长停滞的根因。

source.title: The non-technical PM’s guide to building with Cursor | Zevi Arnovitz (Meta)
source.summary: The complete AI workflow that lets non-technical people build real products in Cursor.

translated.title: 非技术 PM 的 Cursor 实战指南 | Zevi Arnovitz（Meta）
translated.summary: 这是一套完整的 AI 工作流，帮助非技术背景的人也能在 Cursor 中构建真实可用的产品。

source.title: How to show up in any room with a low heart rate: Silicon Valley’s missing etiquette playbook | Sam Lessin
source.summary: Silicon Valley’s missing etiquette playbook, covering startup building, product design, and operator lessons.

translated.title: 如何在任何场合都保持从容：硅谷缺失的礼仪手册 | Sam Lessin
translated.summary: 聚焦硅谷常被忽视的“礼仪与分寸感”，内容覆盖创业、产品设计与一线操盘经验。

source.title: The power user’s guide to Codex: parallelizing workflows, planning techniques, advanced context engineering tips, automating code reviews, and more | Alexander Embiricos
source.summary: How to set up and use Codex in VS Code and terminal environments for both simple and complex coding tasks.

translated.title: 重度用户版 Codex 指南：并行工作流、规划技巧、上下文工程与自动化代码评审 | Alexander Embiricos
translated.summary: 讲清如何在 VS Code 与终端中配置并使用 Codex，覆盖从简单任务到复杂工程协作的完整实践路径。
